name: xau_m5_asia_london_range_expansion
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the Asia session (00:00-06:00 UTC) forms an accumulation range; the first ATR-qualified breakout during London window (07:00-10:00 UTC) captures the volatility expansion edge.

entry_rules.long: time in [07:00, 10:00 UTC] AND close > asia_high AND (close - asia_high) >= 0.5 * ATR(14) AND breakout_candle_body >= 1.0 * ATR(14) AND asia_range/ATR(14) between 0.5 and 2.0 AND no_prior_breakout_today
entry_rules.short: time in [07:00, 10:00 UTC] AND close < asia_low AND (asia_low - close) >= 0.5 * ATR(14) AND breakout_candle_body >= 1.0 * ATR(14) AND asia_range/ATR(14) between 0.5 and 2.0 AND no_prior_breakout_today

exit_rules.sl: opposite side of asia_range OR 1.5 * ATR(14), whichever is tighter
exit_rules.time_stop: close at 15:00 UTC (end of London lunch) or after 36 bars

regime_filter.rule: strict session gating: range-build window 00:00-06:00 UTC, trade-only window 07:00-10:00 UTC, max 9 bars after London open
